summary: Tested multi-tenant permission system with role-specific navigation and landing pages. Super Admin and Operator features working correctly. Admin user has limited navigation due to missing permissions assignment.

minor.issue: Admin user (admin@test.com) has no permissions assigned, causing Admin Config and Service Management to not appear in sidebar

integration_issues.issue: Admin Config and Service Management not visible for admin@test.com due to missing permissions in database

passed_tests: Super Admin login with superadmin@oryno.com lands on /admin/analytics (Analytics Dashboard)
Super Admin Dashboard button navigates to /admin/analytics
Super Admin Sales is a top-level menu item (not in Admin Config)
Super Admin Sales page shows 'Platform Sales Dashboard' with 'Cumulative sales data across all operators and services'
Super Admin Admin Config contains: Trip Report, All Bookings, Dashboard for Admins, User Management, Operators, Employees, Commission, Bills, Audit Logs, Permissions, Database, Validation
Super Admin Service Management is visible
Operator login with operator@test.com (with checkbox) lands on /admin/analytics (Analytics Dashboard)
Operator Sales is a top-level menu item
Operator Sales page shows 'Sales Dashboard - My Business' with 'Sales performance for your services'
Operator Sales page shows assigned services badge: 'Services: banquet, event'
Operator Admin Config contains only: Team & Roles, Audit Log
Operator Admin Config does NOT contain Bookings or Bills
Admin login with admin@test.com lands on /orders (All Orders page)
Admin Dashboard button navigates to /admin/admin-dashboard (Admin Dashboard page)
failed_tests: Admin Admin Config not visible (due to missing permissions)
Admin Service Management not visible (due to missing permissions)
action_items: Assign default permissions to admin role users so Admin Config and Service Management appear in sidebar
Consider adding default permissions for admin role in seed data or role assignment
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx correctly redirects: Super Admin -> /admin/analytics, Admin -> /orders, Operator -> /admin/analytics
Layout.jsx correctly shows Sales as top-level menu for Super Admin and Operator
Layout.jsx correctly shows 'Dashboard for Admins' in Super Admin's Admin Config
Layout.jsx correctly limits Operator Admin Config to Team & Roles and Audit Log only
SalesManagement.jsx correctly shows personalized title for operators vs cumulative for super admin
Admin user permissions need to be assigned in database for full navigation access

operator.note: Must check 'I'm logging in as a service operator' checkbox

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant permission system tested. Super Admin and Operator navigation working correctly. Admin user (admin@test.com) has no permissions assigned in database, causing Admin Config and Service Management to not appear. Main agent should either: 1) Assign default permissions to admin users in seed data, or 2) Update Layout.jsx to show Admin Config for admin role regardless of permissions. The permission system is working as designed - admin users need explicit permission assignment.
